line_1: Or, at the foot of frowning crags upreared,
line_2: Complains like one forsaken and unheard.

line_1: In vain against the son of Jove uprear'd
line_2: And Hercules, whom trembling Lerna fear'd,

line_1: In vain against the son of Jove uprear'd
line_2: Head sprouting under head, by thrillant faulchion shear'd.
